paragraphs: Owning a vehicle in the Denver metro area means dealing with harsh sun, heavy snow, mag-chloride, road salt, and unpredictable weather—all of which can quickly dull and damage your paint. System X MAX G Plus ceramic coating from Front Range Detail Studio is the best way to keep your car looking new, reduce maintenance, and protect your investment with confidence.
Industry-leading ceramic technology for the deepest gloss, extreme hydrophobicity, and maximum chemical resistance.
Registered on your CarFax and fully transferable, with annual maintenance and top coat reapplication required to keep the warranty valid.
All coating is performed in our climate-controlled Centennial facility for flawless, dust-free results—never mobile.
Get up to 5 years of warranty on brand new boats and 3 years on new RVs and motorhomes.
No hype, no hard sell—just honest advice, clear communication, and the best products for Colorado conditions.
We assess your vehicle’s condition, discuss your expectations, and recommend the right package for your needs.
Every ceramic job starts with a full wash, clay bar, and machine polish to remove swirls and bring out maximum gloss.
We apply multiple layers of System X MAX G Plus by hand, ensuring even, durable coverage over all painted surfaces.
After curing, we inspect every inch of your car and walk you through the results and care instructions.

Ceramic coating is a liquid polymer applied to the exterior surfaces of your vehicle. Once cured, it forms a durable, hydrophobic layer that bonds to the paint, offering long-term protection and making maintenance a breeze.
Dirt and grime are less likely to stick, making washing faster and easier.
Water, dirt, and grime slide off the surface.
Shields your paint from harmful UV rays, preventing fading and oxidation.
Achieve a deep, mirror-like finish.
Protects against acidic contaminants, bird droppings, and bug splatter.
Professional application ensures the best results.
We treat your vehicle with the care it deserves.
We only use premium ceramic coatings with proven durability.
Peace of mind with manufacturer-backed warranties.
Dedicated time and care for every vehicle.
Our System X coatings provide years of durable defense against UV rays, chemicals, bird droppings, and environmental fallout.
Water, dirt, and contaminants slide right off—keeping your car cleaner between washes.
Protects your paint from fading and oxidation caused by Colorado’s intense high-altitude sun.
The hard ceramic layer resists light scratches, road salt, and chemical exposure.
All of our System X ceramic coating packages come with a manufacturer-backed warranty for your peace of mind.
We start with a meticulous hand wash to remove surface dirt and debris.
Clay bar treatment and chemical decontamination remove embedded contaminants.
Multi-stage machine polishing to remove swirls, scratches, and imperfections.
Multiple layers of System X MAX G Plus applied by hand for even, durable coverage.
Infrared curing in our climate-controlled studio for optimal bond strength.
Every inch inspected under specialized lighting before delivery.

System X MAX G Plus creates a permanent, glass-like layer that’s far more durable than wax or traditional sealants. It protects against UV, chemicals, road salts, and environmental fallout—delivering a deeper shine and easier maintenance.

Yes! Your ceramic coating is registered on CarFax and with System X. To maintain your lifetime warranty, you must return annually for a maintenance wash and a fresh ceramic top coat application, performed by us. This keeps your protection at peak performance and your warranty active.
Ceramic coating is extremely scratch-resistant, but it won’t stop rock chips like PPF. For complete protection, many customers combine both.
Absolutely! In fact, we recommend it—ceramic coating on top of PPF makes your protected car even easier to clean and enhances the gloss.

Yes! We offer professional ceramic coatings for virtually every part of your vehicle. This includes wheels, brake calipers, plastic trim, glass, and all interior surfaces (leather, fabric, vinyl, and plastics). Ceramic coating your interior helps repel stains, makes cleaning easier, and protects against UV fading.

Definitely. We use a dedicated matte/satin ceramic coating that preserves the non-glossy look of matte finishes while offering the same high level of protection and the same warranty. Matte vehicles, wraps, and PPF benefit just as much from ceramic protection—without changing the appearance.
Hand wash or use a touchless wash only. Avoid harsh chemicals. We’ll give you a personalized care guide at delivery and invite you to join our annual maintenance program.
Yes! We offer System X MAX G Plus with a 5-year warranty for new boats and a 3-year warranty for new RVs and motorhomes.

Preserve the pristine condition of your vehicle with our high-quality Paint Protection Film, or Clear Bra. Our warranty backed PPF acts as an invisible shield, guarding your car’s paint against scratches, stone chips, and road debris. With self-healing technology and a ceramic coating layer applied over the film, our PPF service is the clear choice to protect your investment in South Denver, Colorado

Our clients have one thing in common: they love their vehicle. From the Class A motorhome to the two-door convertible, our team of detail specialists are equipped and experienced to handle all detailing needs anywhere in Metro Denver.

Preserve the pristine condition of your vehicle with our high-quality Paint Protection Film, or Clear Bra. Our warranty backed PPF acts as an invisible shield, guarding your car's paint against scratches, stone chips, and road debris. With advanced self-healing technology and ceramic coating, your vehicle stays looking brand new. Protect your investment with our expert application.

“Same day service. Excellent and professional service. My RV is 7 years old and just completed a 1500 mile journey Covered in dust, dirt and bug covered windshield Sam cleaned everything and made it look brand new and shiny. I'm very happy with the results.”
— Geri P.

“Brought 10 year old Navion motorhome to Sam for wash, polish and wax job. The quality of workmanship performed by Sam and crew was simply outstanding. We are more than pleased with the results. This is the best RV detailing service I've ever used...”
— TG G.

“We used Front Range Mobile Detailing to detail the exterior of our 20+ year old boat...it looks new. The service specifically was boat oxidation removal and buffing. Sam is very responsive and communicated through the whole process...”
— Cindy T.
“Front range did an excellent job on our 5th wheel & F350! Sam was extremely knowledgeable and explained how he only uses top line products. His team brought the brand new shine back!”
— Alyson W.

“I have nothing but good things to say about Front Range Detail Studio. Impeccable work, driven by attention to detail and obvious care for their customers. Experts at ceramic coating and maintenance. And we just added clear bra to the mix, and they did an excellent job with the applications. Very trusting of these guys with my CT5-V. Trust them as well, you won't be disappointed.”
— Steve E.

“On Point!!! Communication, Quality, Customer Service... All 5 star. I needed to get my truck ready to sell asap. I was wanting the full package, all the stuff. Dirty truck thats seen some miles and some roads. Honesty! They told me that I didn't need all the extras and gave me a detailed explanation and a package that would suffice for a great price.”
— Alex

“My experience started out looking for ceramic coating and thankfully Front Range Detail came up. It has the most 5 star reviews and I am another 5 star for them. The 1st thing that stood out to me was when we did the walk around my vehicle, they didn't try to up sell me...”

“We recently bought a new Jayco Class A Motorhome and wanted to ensure its bodywork stays in tip-top condition as long as possible. We engaged Sam and his team over 12 months ago to apply a ceramic coating and then regularly maintain and clean it since. They have done an amazing job and the unit still looks like it rolled off the assembly line yesterday despite Colorado weather and the miles.”
— Dean P.

jsonld.name: Ceramic Coating
jsonld.description: System X MAX G Plus ceramic coating with lifetime warranty. Professional studio-only application in our climate-controlled Centennial facility.

mainEntity.name: What makes System X MAX G Plus different from wax or sealant?

acceptedAnswer.text: System X MAX G Plus creates a permanent, glass-like layer that’s far more durable than wax or traditional sealants. It protects against UV, chemicals, road salts, and environmental fallout—delivering a deeper shine and easier maintenance.

mainEntity.name: Is the lifetime warranty real? What are the requirements?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes! Your ceramic coating is registered on CarFax and with System X. To maintain your lifetime warranty, you must return annually for a maintenance wash and a fresh ceramic top coat application, performed by us. This keeps your protection at peak performance and your warranty active.

mainEntity.name: Will ceramic coating prevent scratches or rock chips?

acceptedAnswer.text: Ceramic coating is extremely scratch-resistant, but it won’t stop rock chips like PPF. For complete protection, many customers combine both.
Absolutely! In fact, we recommend it—ceramic coating on top of PPF makes your protected car even easier to clean and enhances the gloss.

mainEntity.name: Can I ceramic coat every surface on my vehicle—including the interior?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes! We offer professional ceramic coatings for virtually every part of your vehicle. This includes wheels, brake calipers, plastic trim, glass, and all interior surfaces (leather, fabric, vinyl, and plastics). Ceramic coating your interior helps repel stains, makes cleaning easier, and protects against UV fading.

mainEntity.name: Can you ceramic coat matte paint or satin finishes?

acceptedAnswer.text: Definitely. We use a dedicated matte/satin ceramic coating that preserves the non-glossy look of matte finishes while offering the same high level of protection and the same warranty. Matte vehicles, wraps, and PPF benefit just as much from ceramic protection—without changing the appearance.

mainEntity.name: How do I maintain my ceramic coating?

acceptedAnswer.text: Hand wash or use a touchless wash only. Avoid harsh chemicals. We’ll give you a personalized care guide at delivery and invite you to join our annual maintenance program.

mainEntity.name: Do you offer ceramic coating for boats and RVs?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes! We offer System X MAX G Plus with a 5-year warranty for new boats and a 3-year warranty for new RVs and motorhomes.
